<text><loc_219><loc_214><loc_248><loc_218>Not to scale</text>
<otsl><loc_46><loc_242><loc_454><loc_349><fcel>PIN<fcel>TYPE<fcel>DESCRIPTION<nl><fcel>NAME<fcel>DBV<fcel>Enable pin. Drive EN greater than V$_{H}$$_{I}$ to turn on the regulator. Drive EN less than V$_{LO}$ to place the LDO into shutdown mode.<nl><fcel>EN<fcel>3<fcel>-<nl><fcel>GND<fcel>2<fcel>-<nl><fcel>IN<fcel>1<fcel>1<nl><fcel>NC<fcel>4<fcel>2, 5<nl><fcel>OUT<fcel>5<fcel>1<nl><fcel>Thermal pad<fcel>-<fcel>Pad<nl><caption><loc_203><loc_236><loc_297><loc_242>Table 4-1. Pin Functions</caption></otsl>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_46><loc_355><loc_452><loc_366>(1) Make sure the nominal input and output capacitance are greater than 0.47µF. Throughout this document the nominal derating on these capacitors is 50%. Make sure that the effective capacitance at the pin is greater than 0.47µF.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
